title: Named skillsets CLI
description: Implement the approved named skillsets CLI in five incremental beads, delivering the safe init/create/use core first. Source plan: docs/plans/2026-07-10-named-skillsets-cli-implementation.md
close_reason: Completed all five named skillsets CLI implementation beads

title: Bead 1: Safe core MVP - init, create, use
description: Deliver the first safe usable CLI slice: executable and black-box harness; name/path validation; advisory locking; init migration and rollback; empty and cloned create; atomic use; minimal README. All exposed commands must reject invalid layouts and preserve the design-spec invariants. Acceptance: observed RED/GREEN coverage for happy paths, refusal cases, contention, interrupted staging, and rollback failures; python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v exits 0; bin/skillset --help lists only implemented commands. Source: plan Bead 1.
close_reason: Completed safe core MVP with init, create, use, tests, and minimal documentation

title: Bead 2: Managed upstream delegation
description: Add skillset skills passthrough with inherited terminal behavior, exact exit status, global flag injection, project-scope rejection, unknown-command warning, child-only XDG_STATE_HOME removal, invalid-layout refusal, and lifetime advisory locking. Acceptance: fake-npx argument, environment, signal, exit, and contention tests pass; python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v exits 0. Source: plan Bead 2.
close_reason: Completed managed upstream delegation with scope safety, process inheritance, and lock-lifetime coverage

title: Bead 3: Inspection and everyday usability
description: Add lock-protected read-only list, current, verbose list, and show commands plus the focused dependency-free frontmatter parser and malformed-skill reporting. All commands reject uninitialized or invalid layouts. Acceptance: sorted and script-friendly output and all supported/malformed scalar cases are tested; python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v exits 0. Source: plan Bead 3.
close_reason: Completed deterministic inspection commands and focused frontmatter parsing with read-only locking and malformed-entry isolation

title: Bead 4: Remaining lifecycle operations
description: Add rename and remove with active-set safeguards, confirmation and --yes, collision refusal, containment, symlink safety, and recoverable and failed rollback reporting. Acceptance: lifecycle happy paths and all destructive refusal cases are black-box tested; python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v exits 0. Source: plan Bead 4.
close_reason: Completed safe rename and remove lifecycle operations with confirmation, rollback, stale-staging refusal, and fault coverage

title: Bead 5: Diagnostics and hardening
description: Add lock-protected non-mutating doctor diagnostics, severity-aware exits, invalid/partial layout reporting, lock/content and metadata checks, recovery-message retrofit, complete regression coverage, and final README guidance. Acceptance: every design-spec section maps to passing behavior or documentation; python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v exits 0. Source: plan Bead 5.
close_reason: Completed diagnostics and hardening with doctor aggregation, lock and symlink safety, recovery guidance, and full regression coverage

title: Extract skillset CLI into focused library modules
description: Implement docs/plans/2026-07-10-skillset-module-extraction.md while preserving the complete black-box CLI contract and transactional safety semantics.
close_reason: Completed module extraction; 92 black-box tests and final review passed

title: Add --use to skillset create
description: Implement docs/specs/2026-07-10-create-use-flag-design.md using docs/plans/2026-07-10-create-use-flag-implementation.md. Support options before or after NAME, preserve separate create/use commit boundaries, add black-box fault tests, and update README.
close_reason: Implemented create --use with flexible option ordering, transactional boundary tests, help text, and README documentation; 97-test suite passes and final review is clean.

title: Describe skillset create --from in help
description: Add the exact help text 'clone from an existing skillset' to the create subcommand's --from option, cover it with a focused black-box help test, and run the full suite.
close_reason: Added exact --from help description with focused RED/GREEN coverage; final 97-test suite passes and read-only review is clean.

title: Add -f alias for skillset create --from
description: Add -f as a short alias for create --from, with black-box clone and help coverage. Skip standalone spec and plan documents per user request.
close_reason: Added -f alias for create --from with black-box clone/help coverage; final 97-test suite passes and review is clean.

title: Make skillset show easier to use
description: Allow NAME to default to the active skillset, render aligned tabular output, and colorize interactive output while preserving safe non-interactive output.
close_reason: Implemented optional active-set selection, aligned table output, safe TTY styling, documentation, and tests.

title: Cap skillset show separator to terminal width
description: When skillset show writes to a TTY, detect the current terminal column count at render time and truncate only the separator line so it does not wrap. Keep full descriptions and all other rows unchanged; preserve complete deterministic separator output for pipes and redirects; fall back to the full separator when width detection fails or reports a nonpositive value. Add PTY width coverage.

title: Improve skillset list -v output
description: Replace verbose skillset listing's tab-separated output with the approved aligned, TTY-aware table; include valid and invalid entries, preserve plain list behavior, update documentation, and add focused verification.
